what_was_done: Session 235: Wired L0 raw transcript search into memory system. Added 3 functions to db.py (_summarize_record, _window_around_timestamp, get_raw_transcript_window) for reading raw JSONL transcripts with truncation and time windowing. New mode="transcript" in search_knowledge() and transcript_context() MCP tool in analytics_server.py. Added transcript_l0 toggle in config.json (default: off) and statusline line 3. Toggled terminal_l2_always to true. Compared L0 vs L2 vs Enrich tradeoffs. 15 new tests, 1437 pass. Pushed to origin/evolution-branch. Switched GitHub to sjxcrypto.
